title: selaginella culverwellii
intro: Selaginella culverwellii, also known as Culverwell's spikemoss, is a species of spore-bearing plant that belongs to the genus Selaginella, a group of vascular plants that are often referred to as resurrection plants due to their ability to survive in harsh conditions. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella culverwellii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and provide antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
